CREATE TABLE foaf_namespace (id INT, namespace VARCHAR(255), local_part VARCHAR(255));
SELECT __xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part) FROM foaf_namespace WHERE id = 1;
SELECT __xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part) FROM foaf_namespace WHERE local_part LIKE '%s%';
SELECT n.id, __xml_ns_uname(n.namespace, n.local_part) AS uname FROM foaf_namespace n WHERE n.id IN (SELECT id FROM foaf_namespace WHERE local_part = 'knows');
SELECT __xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part) FROM foaf_namespace ORDER BY id DESC;
CREATE TABLE rdf_triples (subject VARCHAR(255), predicate VARCHAR(255), object VARCHAR(255));
SELECT __xml_ns_uname('foaf', 'knows') AS foaf_knows, s.object FROM rdf_triples s WHERE s.predicate = __xml_ns_uname('foaf', 'knows');
SELECT __xml_ns_uname(n.namespace, n.local_part) FROM foaf_namespace n JOIN rdf_triples r ON r.predicate = __xml_ns_uname(n.namespace, n.local_part);
SELECT __xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part) AS uname FROM foaf_namespace WHERE local_part IN (SELECT DISTINCT local_part FROM foaf_namespace);
SELECT DISTINCT __xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part) FROM foaf_namespace WHERE namespace = (SELECT namespace FROM foaf_namespace WHERE local_part = 'likes');
SELECT COUNT(__xml_ns_uname(namespace, local_part)) FROM foaf_namespace WHERE id > 1;
